word.definition: Tacit is a formal adjective used to describe something that is expressed or understood without being directly stated.

sports_fact.text: The longest tennis match ever lasted 11 hours and 5 minutes over three days: Isner beat Mahut 70-68 in the fifth set at Wimbledon 2010. The scoreboard wasn't programmed to go that high.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: Investors Take Mideast Tensions in Stride
market.summary: Nasdaq gains; oil stabilizes after yesterday's jump

quote.text: If we are to change our world view, images have to change. The artist now has a very important job to do. He's not a little peripheral figure entertaining rich people, he's really needed.
quote.author: David Hockney

history.text: The Old Swiss Confederacy makes great strides in establishing control over its territory by soundly defeating the Duchy of Austria in the Battle of Sempach.
